Metadata.title: ProMindLab — AI-Powered Websites, SaaS & Bots in 3-7 Days | From ₽25,000
Metadata.description: We build premium websites, SaaS platforms and Telegram bots using AI (Claude, GPT-4) in 3-7 days. Top-agency quality at 10x lower price. Landing pages from ₽25,000, e-commerce from ₽80,000, SaaS from ₽150,000. Guaranteed results.

WhyUs.headline: Why
WhyUs.subtitle: You can try building a website through AI yourself. We know how it usually ends.

selfItems: Don't know which prompt to write
Code works but you don't know why
Errors that are impossible to find
Site is not optimized and not indexed
No support — you're on your own
proItems: Prompt engineers know how to give AI the right task
SEO, speed, indexing from day one

cards.title: Prompt Engineers
cards.description: We know how to talk to AI correctly. The right prompt is 80% of the result. We've written thousands of prompts and know exactly what to write to get perfect results on the first try.

cards.title: Fullstack Developers
cards.description: AI writes the code, we review, refine and optimize it. We understand every line of code and know when AI makes mistakes. Result — clean professional product.

cards.title: AI Integrators
cards.description: We know which AI tool is right for each task. Claude for code, Midjourney for design, GPT-4 for text. The combination of tools gives results impossible to achieve with a single tool.

BigStat.quote: The average entrepreneur spends 3-6 weeks trying to build a website with ChatGPT on their own. Gets a template result that doesn't convert. Then comes to us anyway.

stats.label: of clients come after failed self-attempts
on average an entrepreneur wastes on self-attempts

FAQ.headline: Frequently
FAQ.subtitle: Answers to popular questions about our work

items.q: How does AI help in development?
items.a: AI tools (Claude, GPT-4, Cursor) generate up to 80% of code, create design mockups and automate testing. We control quality, architecture and business logic. Result — a top-agency product in a fraction of the time and price.

items.q: Why is it so fast and cheap?
items.a: AI automates routine tasks: writing boilerplate code, layout, infrastructure setup. We focus on architecture, UX and business logic. This allows reducing development time by 5-10x without losing quality.

items.q: What quality guarantees do you provide?
items.a: We guarantee: code passes code review, testing on all devices, Lighthouse score 90+. If the result doesn't satisfy you — we refund 100% of payment. After launch we provide free support from 1 to 6 months.

items.q: Will there be support after launch?
items.a: Yes! Depending on the package — from 1 to 6 months of free support. Bug fixing, minor improvements, consultations. After the free period — technical support by subscription from ₽10,000/month.
Of course! During development — up to 3 rounds of free revisions. In the "Premium" package — unlimited revisions. We work iteratively: showing results at each stage.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: We accept: bank cards, business account (for legal entities), ЮKassa, Stripe (for international clients). Payment in 2 stages: 50% upfront + 50% after project delivery.

items.q: Do you work with international clients?
items.a: Yes, we work with clients from Russia, Kazakhstan, Belarus, Uzbekistan and other CIS countries. For international clients we accept payment in USD/EUR via Stripe.

We show a prototype before the main development begins. If the concept doesn't suit you — we refund the deposit. If the final result doesn't meet the specifications — we revise for free or refund the money.

SeoContent.title: Website, SaaS Platform and Bot Development with Artificial Intelligence
SeoContent.intro: ProMindLab — agency for developing websites, web applications and Telegram bots using artificial intelligence. We create premium solutions in 3-7 days at prices 5-10x lower than traditional development, using cutting-edge AI technologies: Claude AI, GPT-4, GitHub Copilot and Cursor AI.
SeoContent.stackText: In development we use: React, Next.js, Node.js, Python, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Supabase, Firebase, Telegram Bot API, Stripe, ЮKassa. AI tools automate up to 80% of routine tasks — writing code, layout, testing — allowing projects to be completed in 3-7 days instead of 2-6 months.
SeoContent.portfolioText: Over the past year we have developed and launched more than 50 projects for startups, small and medium businesses in Russia and CIS countries. Our cases include fintech platforms, educational services, e-commerce solutions, CRM systems and sales automation through Telegram bots. Average development time — 7 days, client satisfaction — 100%.
SeoContent.guaranteesText: We guarantee premium quality: modern design, responsive layout, fast loading (Lighthouse 90+), SEO optimization, security. Unlimited revisions during development, 24/7 technical support, system training. 100% money back guarantee if not satisfied.
SeoContent.geographyText: We work with clients across Russia (Moscow, St. Petersburg, Kazan, Novosibirsk, Yekaterinburg) and CIS countries (Kazakhstan, Belarus, Uzbekistan, Armenia). All processes remote: online meetings, demos via Vercel. Payment: bank transfer, ЮKassa, Stripe.
serviceItems: Landing page development from ₽25,000 in 2-3 days — single-page sites with animations, responsive design and SEO optimization
Corporate website creation from ₽60,000 in 5-7 days — multi-page sites with CMS, integrations and content management
SaaS platform development (MVP) from ₽150,000 in 7-14 days — web applications with user dashboard, authentication, database and API
Telegram and WhatsApp bots from ₽30,000 in 3-5 days — communication automation, order processing, CRM and payment integration
Online stores from ₽80,000 in 5-7 days — e-commerce with cart, ЮKassa payment, catalog and delivery
Web applications from ₽100,000 in 7-10 days — dashboards, analytics, business process automation

Footer.tagline: We build websites, SaaS, bots and web applications using AI technologies in 3-7 days.
